title: Senior Full Stack Engineer (NestJS/React)
description: We are seeking a seasoned Full Stack Engineer to architect and build our core platform. You will be responsible for end-to-end feature delivery.
summary:
- 5+ years of TypeScript experience
- Deep knowledge of NestJS and React
- Experience with PostgreSQL
benefits:
- Fully remote work
- Unlimited PTO
- Comprehensive health insurance

title: Product Marketing Manager
description: Join our fast-paced marketing team to drive product launches and go-to-market strategies for our B2B SaaS offerings.
summary:
- 3+ years in B2B SaaS marketing
- Strong copywriting skills
- Data-driven approach to campaigns
benefits:
- Hybrid work schedule
- Annual learning stipend
- Gym membership

title: Junior UI/UX Designer
description: An excellent opportunity for a junior designer to grow within a mentorship-driven environment. You will assist in wireframing and prototyping.
summary:
- Portfolio demonstrating UI/UX principles
- Proficiency in Figma
- Basic understanding of HTML/CSS
